heading: Powers
label: 110106 Powers
text: The corporation has only the powers provided in its bylaws and articles of incorporation filed in each State in which it is incorporated.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)11010636:2702., , .Aug. 21, 1984Pub. L. 98–391, § 298 Stat. 1358The words “and subject to the laws of such State or States” are omitted as unnecessary.
